CustomField.description: The API path for the chat completions endpoint appended to the Named Credential base URL. Leave blank if the Named Credential already includes the full URL (e.g. /api/v1/chat/completions).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional path appended to the Named Credential base URL (e.g. /api/v1/chat/completions). Leave blank if the Named Credential already includes the full endpoint URL.
CustomField.label: Chat Completions Path
